id: install-certificate

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Install Certificate"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/install_certificate"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This API is used to install certificates. 

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"command":{"type":"string","example":"install_certificate","description":"Command issued to install new certificate"},"requestId":{"type":"string","example":"abc123","description":"A unique identifier for the request, allowing tracking and debugging of the operation."},"certDetails":{"title":"certDetails","x-stoplight":{"id":"0114c36cfa592"},"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string","example":"sotiAgent","description":"A logical name for the certificate entry, typically representing the application, service, or agent."},"type":{"type":"string","example":"client","enum":["client","server","mqtt","wifi","filestore"],"description":"Certificate category that identifies where the certificate is used."},"authenticationType":{"type":"string","enum":["NONE","BASIC","TOKEN","CERTIFICATE"],"example":"BASIC","description":"Specifies the authentication method used to access the remote certificate source.\n- `NONE`: No authentication is used.\n- `BASIC`: HTTP Basic authentication using username and password. In this case, `authenticateOptions` is required.\n- `TOKEN`: Token-based authentication. This option is currently not supported.\n- `CERTIFICATE`: Certificate-based authentication used to download or retrieve certificates."},"certSource":{"type":"string","enum":["HTTP","DIRECT"],"example":"HTTP","description":"Specifies how certificate content is supplied for installation. This field is optional.\nIf omitted, the default behavior is `HTTP`, and the device attempts to download certificate content from the URLs provided in `url`.\n- `DIRECT`: Certificate content is provided inline in `certificateBundle`.\n- `HTTP`: Certificate content is downloaded from remote URLs in `url`.\nFor `HTTP` with `authenticationType` set to `CERTIFICATE`, authentication can use inline certificate content in `caCertificateFileContent` or an already installed filestore certificate."},"url":{"type":"array","description":"A list of key-value entries that map certificate components to downloadable URLs.","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"The certificate component identifier.","enum":["ca_cert","client_key","client_cert","cert_key_password"]},"value":{"type":"string","description":"The URL for the specified component. For `cert_key_password`, this is the key password value."}}}},"authenticateOptions":{"type":"object","description":"Authentication options for credential-based access. Required when `authenticationType` is `BASIC`.","properties":{"username":{"type":"string","example":"rfid","description":"Username used for HTTP Basic authentication."},"password":{"type":"string","example":"rfid","description":"Password used for HTTP Basic authentication."}}},"pfxPassword":{"type":"string","example":"pass@123","description":"Password for the PFX (PKCS#12) bundle when a PFX certificate is provided. This field is currently not supported for RFD40/90."},"headerParams":{"type":"array","description":"A list of key-value pairs representing HTTP header parameters. This field is currently not supported.","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"The key for the HTTP header parameter."},"value":{"type":"string","description":"The value associated with the HTTP header parameter."}}}},"queryParams":{"type":"array","description":"A list of key-value pairs representing query parameters. This field is currently not supported.","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"The key for the query parameter."},"value":{"type":"string","description":"The value associated with the query parameter."}}}},"verificationType":{"type":"string","enum":["NONE","VERIFY_PEER","VERIFY_HOST","VERIFY_HOST_PEER"],"example":"NONE","description":"Specifies the TLS verification mode used when validating remote endpoints."},"certificateBundle":{"type":"object","description":"Optional inline certificate payload used when `certSource` is `DIRECT`.\nProvide certificate content for one certificate `type`: `client`, `server`, `mqtt`, `wifi`, or `filestore`.","properties":{"ca_cert":{"type":"string","description":"Inline CA certificate content, typically in PEM or base64-encoded form."},"client_key":{"type":"string","description":"Inline client private key content, typically in PEM or base64-encoded form."},"client_cert":{"type":"string","description":"Inline client certificate content, typically in PEM or base64-encoded form."},"cert_key_password":{"type":"string","description":"Password used to decrypt an encrypted client private key, when required."}}},"caCertificateFileContent":{"type":"string","description":"Optional inline certificate content used only for remote certificate download authentication.\n- Not applicable when `certSource` is `DIRECT`.\n- Applicable only when `certSource` is `HTTP` and `authenticationType` is `CERTIFICATE`.\n- If applicable and this field is empty, the device uses an already installed filestore certificate for authentication."}},"required":["type","authenticationType"]}},"required":["command","requestId"]},"examples":{"Filestore certificate using URL":{"description":"Payload to install filestore CA certificate","value":{"command":"install_certificate","requestId":"19001","certDetails":{"name":"root_certs","type":"filestore","authenticationType":"CERTIFICATE","certSource":"HTTP","url":[{"key":"ca_cert","value":"http://192.168.0.107:8080/filestore_ca_cert.pem"}],"verificationType":"VERIFY_HOST_PEER"}}},"MQTT certificates using URL":{"description":"Payload to install MQTT client certificates","value":{"command":"install_certificate","requestId":"19001","certDetails":{"name":"mqtt_certs","type":"mqtt","authenticationType":"CERTIFICATE","certSource":"HTTP","url":[{"key":"client_cert","value":"http://192.168.0.107:8080/mqtt_client_cert.pem"},{"key":"client_key","value":"http://192.168.0.107:8080/mqtt_client_key.pem"},{"key":"ca_cert","value":"http://192.168.0.107:8080/mqtt_ca_cert.pem"}],"verificationType":"VERIFY_HOST_PEER"}}},"WiFi certificates using URL":{"description":"Payload to install WiFi certificates with CA, client cert and key","value":{"command":"install_certificate","requestId":"abc456","certDetails":{"name":"wifi_test","type":"wifi","authenticationType":"NONE","url":[{"key":"client_cert","value":"http://192.168.0.107:8080/wifi_client_cert.pem"},{"key":"ca_cert","value":"http://192.168.0.107:8080/wifi_ca_cert.pem"},{"key":"client_key","value":"http://192.168.0.107:8080/wifi_client_key.pem"}],"verificationType":"NONE"}}},"WiFi CA certificate using direct content":{"description":"Installing WiFi CA certificate, where certificate content is provided as part of API","value":{"requestId":"0001","command":"install_certificate","certDetails":{"type":"wifi","authenticationType":"NONE","certSource":"DIRECT","certificateBundle":{"ca_cert":"-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----\nMIIGDTCCA/WgAwIBAgIIfRvFn+r/D1YwDQYJKoZIhvcNAQELBQAwaTELMAkGA1UE\nBhMCQ0ExEDAOBgNVBAgTB09udGFyaW8xFDASBgNVBAcTC01pc3Npc3NhdWdhMQ0w\nCwYDVQQKEwRTT1RJMQwwCgYDVQQLEwNSSUwxFTATBgNVBAMTDFNPVEktbXF0dC1j\nYTAeFw0yMzEyMDQwNDAxMDBaFw00MzEyMDQwNDAxMDBaMGkxCzAJBgNVBAYTAkNB\nMRAwDgYDVQQIEwdPbnRhcmlvMRQwEgYDVQQHEwtNaXNzaXNzYXVnYTENMAsGA1UE\nChMEU09USTEMMAoGA1UECxMDUklMMRUwEwYDVQQDEwxTT1RJLW1xdHQtY2EwggIi\nMA0GCSqGSIb3DQEBAQUAA4ICDwAwggIKAoICAQCiz2EvfiHV0w8BhbyG7Tu5A696\n4iaR1qceJHsZRbJPkRRmJZi8pCv2B1+/8RZ9aalltNE6M2Dz48NtCNDQSuSAk1ql\ntUuM8ECYNQ+mb7cr5TnJeTlSXZuhG4Qm/kQfhZ1Mk3lE4QQdTxqUZsHXpzgi/bqz\nhx073b7UEyNSssMeCCGBBk7UGui9J6ZmBgL/zJAfz/0uiukvMHnWuflMZou2FVsU\nDSujj444lS9bgAjfoOkuc1mppDkgRuLxpPe6230g/9WhIWsc2ot1N6PaHBI20laY\nToXiafv+X/sAJLjAMYIA/m0TEt8nPRCdTR8wVIRvGQNN2TApz43rpFB/VI3fXfHc\nSEMrgI4N3Bn8zdALVdVBfQFcSG5HLKdLHtWGqNXLG6VljzXY1PLGoAnrcSIT8yJ5\neshxGSmJf3zJqkb3Cmifrpe9M8N8DEGJZcpDCM/YVXw12hzml3bdGfvcvVTN07Hy\nvIE2C1z/UXUMVJXhgtTdJGb7/kDwWNP4YBQE6BumpDEMntWhHRB4WNwedhTNbAOV\ned9aeIN9BnkMg1hlThl+g4+eJFCqIiiMWFD4pWp7SDUX9Qi9X8pYHmgjGnmr2sxl\ndx5sL/UfxNZ3mAzaJcTHdR7Kusp+rhDY9J43NwicA0OaDrfKsppZ5jDmATTvW+VA\nCCPxgksdBub5zVUqnwIDAQABo4G4MIG1MA8GA1UdEwEB/wQFMAMBAf8wHQYDVR0O\nBBYEFPb9BJbwkT3qMEy88LkFsIX2ydepMIGCBgNVHSMEezB5oW2kazBpMQswCQYD\nVQQGEwJDQTEQMA4GA1UECBMHT250YXJpbzEUMBIGA1UEBxMLTWlzc2lzc2F1Z2Ex\nDTALBgNVBAoTBFNPVEkxDDAKBgNVBAsTA1JJTDEVMBMGA1UEAxMMU09USS1tcXR0\nLWNhggh9G8Wf6v8PVjANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQsFAAOCAgEAbcAml6sEG3tvU5bJZ6wQ\nC4SntndCKlLsvcWxgw5Rkv+pcbJVr2Whgqhg1+OA5s+vC6butAdI//ZiTRApxegB\nZA2k0uoxqoWWvgHzrmpSQigy2hxp/+oa3qecC6aS6fi04UwNHF++fkBx+Fkl0e8G\nHHHyAY1txu8Dc1iDWFKRxVoNB1tbQ8gJIsaLJwuiykTf5FGrwMAVlMu90ahilFdz\nj7XWxJiHedY/XHQxGWHwK3WRbC7DP/rniZQb603/oAMuwy0jNltQLMlm5FpjaUmi\nd5Mn1zx8xXg9CBokPAFvg1rk54Z2M3ZnXlVkbMsRy+5fEWS6AtGHMY3Qzt4bJkPS\ntfHRi1clydB867PR50PAykhdLkW3J0+kFnHPBkGnQdrb4ejm7QVVCWA5fpquDmFu\nuNPXQ3xCnUHkal/a/5Ch9/XsQAlHMa7LkwkOD+7GBpUsxXb+8MUBUVXx4f8YQSi6\nEFanr7xSQ2fYviEPZ22ZA4oLH28sgDITueTVytSZwKraXHrgpJ17TcvFD6U4eaBC\nZ+ >
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"default":{"description":"install_certificate response","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"command":{"type":"string","example":"install_certificate"},"requestId":{"type":"string","example":"abc123"},"apiVersion":{"type":"string","enum":["V1.0","V1.1"]},"response":{"title":"response","x-stoplight":{"id":"1uzw0wye4si2y"},"type":"object","properties":{"code":{"type":"integer","example":0,"description":"Response codes:\n\n| Code | Meaning |\n| --- | --- |\n| 0 | Success |\n| 1 | Command payload is accepted |\n| 2 | Invalid payload |\n| 3 | Not able to retrieve information |\n| 4 | Firmware update in progress |\n| 5 | Can't reboot device, inventory in progress |\n| 6 | Region is not configured |\n| 7 | Interface is not available |\n| 8 | Insufficient flash size |\n| 9 | File not found |\n| 10 | Configuration already exists |\n| 11 | Inventory in progress |\n| 12 | No Radio Operation in Progress |\n| 13 | Firmware update Failed |\n| 14 | Battery is low, Cannot update firmware |\n| 15 | WIFI Error - SSID not found |\n| 16 | WIFI Error - Cannot delete active SSID |\n| 17 | WIFI Error - SSID missed |\n| 18 | WIFI Error - SSID already exist |\n| 19 | WIFI Error - SSID count overflow |\n| 20 | Wifi is not supported |\n| 21 | Certificate not found |\n| 22 | Advanced configuration not set |\n| 23 | Invalid enum value |\n| 24 | Max 32 prefilters limit exceeded |\n| 25 | Max 3 publish topics exceeded |\n| 26 | Max 1 subscribe topic exceeded |\n| 27 | Invalid tenant ID length |\n| 28 | Tag match pattern length exceeded |\n| 29 | Url missing for HTTP source |\n| 30 | Certificate content missing for direct source |","minimum":0,"maximum":30},"description":{"type":"string","description":"response description in detail","example":"Success"}},"required":["code","description"]}},"required":["command","requestId","apiVersion","response"]},"examples":{"example1":{"value":{"command":"install_certificate","requestId":"18996","apiVersion":"V1.1","response":{"code":1,"description":"Command payload is accepted"}}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
